title: Job Opening Teacher at Don Bosco Tech

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Don Bosco Tech
jsonLd.description:
Join the Don Bosco Tech family as a Teacher in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Don Bosco Tech:
Don Bosco Tech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Don Bosco Tech!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
